title: Publish a current-state master roadmap
Replace the stale README with current product and setup guidance
Restore the missing legacy image-manifest compatibility path
Add a deterministic sync script and package command for compatibility assets
Reduce future local runtime churn through improved ignore rules
Promote core-principles lectures into a first-class didactic module
Split Downloads lectures into topic-first navigation instead of a flat library
Curate one coherent tutorial track from the imported corpora
Deduplicate overlapping AP/CP/tutorial records across primary and Downloads content
Define canonical versus staged content namespaces in code and docs
Add cross-links between lectures, tutorials, syllabus topics, and atlas entities
Add topic and entity facets to main promoted content views
Add a dedicated algorithm navigator rather than leaving algorithms as raw imports
Normalize image family labels and improve atlas summaries for readability
Add promote-from-staging selection rules so Downloads Library stops being a dumping surface
Unify documentation around one setup path and one product definition
Add deterministic validation for normalized content outputs
Separate generated runtime artifacts from canonical repo content
Establish a clean release baseline with reproducible build verification
Publish a release-ready project map describing what is production-like, staged, or experimental
